content:
Chronicled Wish "Dewlit Tranquility" is now available. During this event wish, the event-exclusive 5-star characters "A Thousand Scents Traced" Emilie (Dendro), "Candlebearer, Shadowhunter" Clorinde (Electro), "Wondrous Dragonheir" Sigewinne (Hydro), "Helm of the Radiant Rose" Navia (Geo), and "Spectacle of Phantasmagoria" Lyney (Pyro), the event-exclusive 5-star weapons Absolution (Sword), Verdict (Claymore), Lumidouce Elegy (Polearm), Silvershower Heartstrings (Bow), and The First Great Magic (Bow), as well as the event-exclusive 4-star weapons The Dockhand's Assistant (Sword), Portable Power Saw (Claymore), Prospector's Drill (Polearm) and Range Gauge (Bow) will be available for a limited time.


※ In most cases, the base probability of all characters and weapons is evenly distributed. If there is a boost or guarantee in effect, please refer to the corresponding rules.


〓Rules〓

5-Star Items

For Chronicled Wish "Dewlit Tranquility": Base probability of winning 5-star item = 0.600%; consolidated probability of winning 5-star item (incl. guarantee) = 1.600%; guaranteed to win 5-star item at least once per 90 attempts.

For Chronicled Wish "Dewlit Tranquility", you can chart a course towards your chosen boosted 5-star character or weapon amongst all 5-star items with "Chronicled Path." The choice of item will only be valid for this period of Chronicled Wish "Dewlit Tranquility".

※ When the Designated Item is a 5-Star Character, the 5-star items you can obtain in the Wish are: 5-Star Characters. When the Designated Item is a 5-Star Weapon, the 5-star items you can obtain in the Wish are: 5-Star Weapons.

When you obtain a 5-star item in this event wish, there is a 50.000% chance it will be the Designated Item. If you obtain a 5-star item that was not your chosen item, you will receive 1 Fate Point. Once you have reached the maximum amount of Fate Points, the next 5-star item will be guaranteed to be your chosen item. Once you have obtained the chosen item, the number of Fate Points will reset to 0 whether or not you have reached maximum points, and you will have to accumulate them again.

After charting a course towards a Designated Item, you can change your choice, but doing so will reset the Fate Points to 0 and you will have to accumulate them again.

For Event Wish Chronicled Wish "Dewlit Tranquility": Consolidated probability of winning the designated 5-star item (incl. guarantee) = 1.067%.

※ The Fate Points for this Wish are only valid for the current period of Chronicled Wish "Dewlit Tranquility". Once the Wish event is over, the number of Fate Points will reset to 0, and you will have to accumulate them again.

4-Star Items

For Chronicled Wish "Dewlit Tranquility": Base probability of winning 4-star item = 5.100%; base probability of winning 4-star character = 2.550%, and base probability of winning 4-star weapon = 2.550%; consolidated probability (incl. guarantee) of winning 4-star item = 13.000%; guaranteed to win 4-star or above item at least once per 10 attempts; probability of winning 4-star item through the guarantee = 99.400%, and probability of winning 5-star item through the guarantee = 0.600%.


5-star weapons won in this wish come with Masterless Starglitter ×10; 4-star weapons won in this wish come with Masterless Starglitter ×2; 3-star weapons won in this wish come with Masterless Stardust ×15.


〓Duplicate Characters〓

On obtaining a 5-star character that you already own (whether obtained in a wish, redeemed at the shop, or awarded by the game): The 2nd – 7th time you obtain the character, it will be converted into that character's Stella Fortuna ×1 and Masterless Starglitter ×10; from the 8th time onwards it will be converted into Masterless Stella Fortuna ×1 and Masterless Starglitter ×25.

On obtaining a 4-star character that you already own (whether obtained in a wish, redeemed at the shop, or awarded by the game): The 2nd – 7th time you obtain the character, it will be converted into that character's Stella Fortuna ×1 and Masterless Starglitter ×2; from the 8th time onwards it will be converted into Masterless Starglitter ×5.


※ This is for "Chronicled Wish." The wish guarantee count is accumulated within "Chronicled Wish" only and is independent of the guarantee counts of other types of wishes.
title: Chronicled Wish "<color=#498fccFF>Dewlit</color> Tranquility"
